meta.title: Mavericks — Private Luxury Real Estate in Marrakech
meta.description: Mavericks presents a confidential selection of villas, riads and exceptional residences in Marrakech, curated for an international clientele.
meta.ogDescription: A private gateway to Marrakech's most desirable addresses.

hero.title: Where Marrakech reveals its most private addresses.
hero.subtitle: Mavericks presents a confidential selection of villas, riads and exceptional residences, curated for an international clientele.
hero.subtitleEditorial: Villas, riads and exceptional residences, selected with discretion for an international clientele.

brandStatement.body:
Mavericks is not a catalogue of properties.
It is a private gateway to Marrakech's most desirable addresses.

collection.title: A rare selection, chosen one address at a time.
collection.intro: Every Mavericks address meets a strict standard of architecture, location and discretion.

villas.title: Private villas
villas.description: Contemporary and neo-Moroccan residences in Palmeraie, Amelkis and beyond.
villas.caption: Architecture, garden, water.

riads.title: Confidential riads
riads.description: Ancient courtyards restored to heritage standards, in the heart of the Medina.
riads.caption: Courtyards, zellige, filtered light.

penthouses.title: Penthouses
penthouses.description: Roof terraces in Hivernage and Agdal, with views over the Atlas and Koutoubia.
penthouses.caption: Heights and horizons.

estates.title: Private estates
estates.description: Vast properties with olive groves, stables and signature gardens.
estates.caption: Vast lands, rare signatures.

offMarket.title: Off-market
offMarket.description: Addresses that are never publicly listed, shared on application.
offMarket.caption: On application, in private.

architecture.title: Atmosphere before property.
architecture.body: Inner courtyards, stone arches, water mirrors, palm shadows — Marrakech's architecture is our starting point.

lifestyle.title: Living Marrakech, slowly.
lifestyle.body: Private gardens, silent patios, views over the Atlas, palm groves and refined hospitality. Our addresses are designed for stillness.

privateAccess.title: Some properties are never published.
privateAccess.body: A significant part of our portfolio is shared only with qualified clients, on request and after introduction.
privateAccess.quiet:
Some properties are never published.
Access begins with a private conversation.

palmeraie.name: Palmeraie
palmeraie.description: Private villas in the heart of the historic palm grove.

hivernage.name: Hivernage
hivernage.description: Residential boulevards, prestige hospitality, close to Guéliz.

amelkis.name: Amelkis
amelkis.description: Golf, security and generous gardens, ten minutes from the Medina.

ourika.name: Route de l'Ourika
ourika.description: Estates with Atlas views, complete stillness.

medina.name: Medina
medina.description: Heritage riads woven into the historic city.

agdal.name: Agdal
agdal.description: Modern residential addresses, royal gardens nearby.

enquiry.title: Begin a discreet conversation.
enquiry.intro: Outline your search. We respond within 24 hours, in full confidence.
enquiry.consent: Your information is treated with the strictest confidence.

footer.tagline: Private selection of real estate opportunities in Marrakech.

visualReveal.caption: Each address is a private film. We frame, we curate, we open the door.
